title: Author product-detail views for the Layout & Motion aisle
description: Author four product-detail views — one per Layout & Motion widget — reusing the shared page skeleton from task 14.

context.aisle_scope: Four products: TCalculatedHeight, TVerticalShrink, THorizontalShrink, TCollapsibleSection.
per_widget_notes: TCalculatedHeight: preview has an 'add item' and 'remove item' button, height scales with item count.
TVerticalShrink / THorizontalShrink: preview has a toggle button that flips visibility and the widget shrinks/expands in the expected direction.
TCollapsibleSection: two sections on the preview, expand/collapse state on the view model.

goals: Four product detail view files under example/lib/showcase/feature/layout_and_motion/views/{widget_snake_case}_showcase/.
Each uses the shared page skeleton.
Each live preview visibly responds to its debug controls.
acceptance_criteria: Opening each of the four pages renders the full page structure.
TCalculatedHeight preview visibly rescales as the visitor adds/removes items.
Shrink previews visibly shrink/expand when toggled.
TCollapsibleSection preview expands and collapses cleanly.
tools_to_use: RepoPrompt MCP for reading each widget's source.
follow_up_notes: Phase 3 task 09 created 4 product-detail view models for the Layout & Motion aisle. Summary:
1. TVerticalShrinkShowcaseViewModel — cells: isVisible (bool, default true). Mutators: toggleVisibility.
2. THorizontalShrinkShowcaseViewModel — cells: isVisible (bool, default true). Mutators: toggleVisibility.

3. TCalculatedHeightShowcaseViewModel — cells: count (int, default 5), baseHeight (double, 200.0), multiplierThreshold (double, 10.0), minHeight (double?), maxHeight (double?). Mutators: addItem, removeItem (no-op at 0), updateCount (clamps negative to 0), updateBaseHeight, updateMultiplierThreshold, updateMinHeight, updateMaxHeight.

4. TCollapsibleSectionShowcaseViewModel — constructor-injects MockContentService. Cells: isExpanded (bool, default true), title (String, sourced from MockContentService.categories.first.title during initialise()). Mutators: toggleExpanded, updateTitle.
